Seat 1: UTG ($10 in chips)
Seat 2: Small Blind ($10 in chips)
Seat 3: Big Blind [ME] ($10 in chips)
UTG : Set dealer [1]
Small Blind : Small blind $0.10
Big Blind [ME] : Big blind $0.25
*** HOLE CARDS ***
UTG : Card dealt to a spot [Jh Jd]
Small Blind : Card dealt to a spot [Ks Kc]
Big Blind [ME] : Card dealt to a spot [Ah As]
UTG : Calls $0.25
Small Blind : Calls $0.15
Big Blind [ME] : Checks
*** FLOP *** [2c 7d 9h]
Big Blind [ME] : Checks
UTG : All-in $9.75
Small Blind : Calls $9.75 All-in
Big Blind [ME] : Calls $9.75
*** TURN *** [2c 7d 9h] [3s]
*** RIVER *** [2c 7d 9h 3s] [5h]
UTG : Showdown [Jh Jd Jh 9h 7d] (One pair)
Small Blind : Showdown [Ks Kc Ks 9h 7d] (One pair)
